title: salix × wolfiana
intro: Salix × wolfiana, also known as the hybrid willow, is a plant resulting from the cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the black willow (Salix nigra). The medicinal properties of Salix × wolfiana lie in its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin, providing relief from pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Salix × wolfiana include reducing fever, alleviating headaches and menstrual cramps, and potentially lowering blood pressure. Salix × wolfiana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
